# Linux Freelancing Training & IT Support in Bangladesh 🇧🇩

Bangladesh is home to School of Freelancing — our team and operations are based here. Even so, training and support are delivered primarily online through live instructor-led sessions, so students and businesses anywhere in Bangladesh can join without visiting an office, with pricing in USD.

[Start Training](/freelancing-training/)
[Get Support](/linux-ai-services/)

## Bangladesh Training & Support Overview

### Training for Bangladesh-Based Freelancers

Learn hands-on Linux server administration, DevOps, VoIP, and AI-platform skills through live instructor-led sessions, then apply them on Guru, Freelancer, and Upwork to tap into Bangladesh's growing freelance and remote-tech market.

[Browse all training →](/freelancing-training/)

### Remote IT Support for Businesses in Bangladesh

Get fast, secure remote support for Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, VoIP systems, and AI platforms — billed in USD with clear, fixed-scope pricing.

[Browse all support services →](/linux-ai-services/)

## Why Work With Us From Bangladesh

- School of Freelancing is based and operated in Bangladesh, so our team understands the local freelance and remote-tech landscape firsthand
- Training and support are still delivered online — no travel or on-site visit needed
- Pricing quoted and billed in USD, matching what you see on our training and support pages
- 24/7 response on Telegram and WhatsApp, with an average reply time of about an hour

## Frequently Asked Questions

Do you have a local office in Bangladesh? +

No. School of Freelancing delivers all training and support online, worldwide — there's no local office anywhere, including Bangladesh.

What currency is training and support priced in for Bangladesh? +

Everything is priced and billed in USD regardless of your location, matching the prices shown on our training and support pages.

Can training be scheduled around time zones in Bangladesh? +

Yes. Live instructor-led sessions are scheduled flexibly to overlap with your local business hours.

How do I get started from Bangladesh? +

Message us on Telegram or WhatsApp to pick a training program or support service, and we'll confirm scheduling.
